infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Loops needs camera access to record short videos that you can share with the community and post to your profile.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Loops needs microphone access to record audio for your videos so you can add sound and voice to the content you create and share.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Loops saves videos to your photo library when you download content you want to keep or save videos you've created in the app. This allows you to keep a local copy of your content
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Loops needs access to your photos and videos so you can select and upload videos from your library to share with the community.

plugins.photosPermission: Loops needs access to your photos and videos so you can select and upload videos from your library to share with the community.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Loops saves videos to your photo library when you download content you want to keep or save videos you've created in the app. This allows you to keep a local copy of your content.

plugins.cameraPermissionText: Loops needs camera access to record short videos that you can share with the community and post to your profile.
plugins.microphonePermissionText: Loops needs microphone access to record audio for your videos so you can add sound and voice to the content you create and share.
